svg.title: Music recommendation flowchart with CSV parsing and per-song loop
svg.desc: Flowchart showing CSV loading, one-time user target normalization, a per-song scoring loop, then ranking and output

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What columns does the CSV file contain?')
sendPrompt('What does the user profile contain?')
sendPrompt('How are CSV rows parsed into song objects?')
sendPrompt('Why is user target normalization done once before the loop?')
sendPrompt('Which song features are normalized and how?')
sendPrompt('How does scoring work for each song?')
sendPrompt('How is the categorical score for genre and mood computed?')
sendPrompt('How is the numeric closeness score per feature computed?')
sendPrompt('What does the formula s_f(i) = 1 - |x_i_f - p_f| mean?')
sendPrompt('How are scores combined into a weighted total?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the full weighted score formula S(i)')
sendPrompt('What happens once all songs have been scored?')
sendPrompt('How are songs ranked after scoring?')
sendPrompt('How should already-consumed songs be filtered out?')
sendPrompt('What tie-breaker rules should be applied?')
sendPrompt('How do we choose K for the top K recommendations?')
sendPrompt('What information should each recommendation include?')
